Box #5—Bring Some Things Together
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #2—Box#4 Take Something Out
*What might you make work together instead of separately?
Find the synergy where two plus two equals five. Maybe it’s a joint venture with another
company. Maybe it’s packaging two products or services together. Maybe it’s combining
two products or services. It’s there. Find it!
*What might you bring closer together or merge?
Think of this one more literally and physically. Find the power in proximity. Would it help
to move two components or two people closer together? What if you moved together or
combined two ideas, or two sections of copy. Try it and see what happens.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
